title: QUANTITY SURVEYOR
description:
Job Title

Quantity Surveyor

Occupation

QUANTITY SURVEYOR

Job Description & Requirements

Job Description & Requirements

The Quantity Surveyor is an executive role and he/she:

- Manages and prepares all the cost estimates for construction-related projects. This spans from initial calculations to the final accounts to help in bidding and determining the price of the goods and services.

- Seeks to minimise costs while adhering to the required standards and policies.

- Keeps track of the progression of the contract with regard to any variation.

- Enhances the overall value of the project while keeping to the standards and policies.

- Works in office and attends to site visits regularly.

Tasks and Responsibilities

- Allocate work to contractors and subcontractors to facilitate the smooth workflow process.

- Assess the degree of hazards and risks to ensure workplace safety is maintained.

- Communicate with the management, contractors and subcontractors on the adjustments to cost estimates.

- Conduct the negotiations during the course of the project in order to ensure issues are resolved.

- Control project scope to meet project objectives in order to enhance project deliverables and key work activities.

- Develop cost reduction strategies to enhance the overall value of the project.

- Monitor project costs to ensure the objectives of the project are achieved in accordance to building contract law.

- Oversee and ensure compliance with standards.

- Prepare tender and contract documents in accordance to the building and construction regulations.

- Handle tendering process such as sourcing quotation, measurement, quantities taking off, etc

- Prepare the cost analysis for the project in order to ensure the overall value is enhanced.

- Prepares progress claims, retention claims, AO/VO, etc.

Requirements

· Preferably individual with a Degree /Diploma in Quantity Surveying, or a related field

· Must be meticulous, detailed & conscientious with a positive working attitude

· Proficient in AutoCAD & MS Office (such as PowerPoint Presentation, Excel)

· Minimum 1 year of experience

· Possess strong project organizational skills, independent, confident and mature individual, yet a strong team player

· Able to handle stress & multi-tasking

· Good communication, interpersonal and problem-solving skills

postedCompany.description: EI CORPORATION PTE. LTD is an established timber, fire and acoustic door manufacturer and installer. We design, fabricate and install various types of doors in residential, industrial and institutional buildings. We are also an active HDB door supplier and have been supplying and installing thousands of timber doors in HDB housing.
